name: leeguooooo-plugins
description: Developer plugins by leeguooooo — for Claude Code, Cursor, and more.

plugins.name: language-coach
plugins.description: Real-time language coaching in Claude Code. Auto-corrects your writing and provides natural expressions on every prompt. Supports any language pair.

plugins.name: zentao-plugin
plugins.description: Use ZenTao from Claude Code through the local zentao CLI. Inspect products, bugs, tasks, and run self-test workflows.

plugins.name: yapi-plugin
plugins.description: Use YApi from Claude Code through the local yapi CLI. Inspect interfaces and sync API docs.

plugins.name: curl-crypto-plugin
plugins.description: Decrypt encrypted curl request parameters and encrypt payloads for test-service calls.

plugins.name: wrangler-accounts
plugins.description: Cloudflare Wrangler multi-account helper. AWS-style profiles for Claude Code with a guard hook that blocks raw wrangler calls.

plugins.name: claude-statusbar
plugins.description: Lightweight Claude Code statusLine monitor. 3 styles × 9 themes, per-segment color management (each metric colors itself by its own severity), per-severity color overrides (cs config set color_ok|warn|hot), cache-expiry countdown + session-cost segments, conversational claude-statusbar skill (no slash commands needed) plus the legacy /statusbar slash commands, cs doctor self-diagnostic. v3.10.0 adds an opt-in live-activity line (in-progress todo, active tool, completed-tool rollup), git ahead/behind + session duration/lines on the project line, running-subagent lines, an opt-in bar_shimmer starfield on the battery bars, a self-hosted plugin marketplace, and a [worktree] marker when the checkout is a linked git worktree — plus a reliability fix so auto-update actually runs in daemon mode (detached, non-blocking) and the cache countdown is now per-session-correct. v3.9.0 makes the cache countdown auto-detect the real prompt-cache TTL (5m vs 1h) from the transcript's usage.cache_creation buckets, fixing a ~55-minute early `cache COLD` for Claude subscription (Pro/Max) users — Claude Code auto-requests the 1-hour TTL on a subscription (the deprecated cache_ttl_seconds config is no longer needed). v3.9.1 makes that countdown always show seconds (58m23s, 1h59m03s) so it visibly ticks instead of sitting on a static 58m. v3.8.1 fixes a long-standing daemon staleness bug: after `pip install -U`, the running daemon's pidfile kept lazy-spawn from restarting it, so users saw old renders until manual `cs daemon stop`; the thin client now detects the version drift via package mtime + a new `daemon_started_at` field and SIGTERMs the outdated daemon on the next tick. v3.8.0 adds a default-on second status-bar line `⤷ <project> ⎇ <branch>●` — project name from Claude Code's `workspace.repo.name` stdin field, branch read from `.git/HEAD` directly, dirty marker refreshed in the background with a 5s cache so the inline render never blocks on git (disable with `cs config set show_project_branch false`). v3.7.0 defends against statusLine hijacking via `cs --setup --project`. v3.6.0 makes daemon mode default — under 1% CPU continuously. Backed by the cs CLI on PyPI.
